items.speaker: narrator
items.text: By the time they arrived, the battle was over. A cavalry colonel named Cao Cao had already cut down ten thousand.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Cao Cao barely glanced at them. Go back, said Huangfu Song — your teacher needs you.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: A wooden cart on the road. Inside it — Lu Zhi, in chains.

items.speaker: zhang_fei
items.text: Let me cut them down and free the teacher!

items.speaker: liu_bei
items.text: No. The court will sort this out.

items.speaker: guan_yu
items.text: General Lu is gone. There's nothing for us here — we should go home.
